name: yourechoagent-mcp
description: Event discovery + AI outreach for AI agents. Find conferences, webinars, meetups, podcasts, and communities in any niche, then draft personalized emails and comments — all from MCP. Tools: discover_events, draft_outreach_for_event, generate_comment_for_community, add_to_radar, hire_echo_agent.

ECHO_API_KEY.description: Echo Agent API key (prefix eak_). Get one at https://yourechoagent.com/for-agents/register

ECHO_API_BASE.description: Override API base URL (defaults to production).
